summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT unit circle with BLUE and ORANGE antipodal probe dots (θ and θ+π) connected by dashed chord, all redrawn as ValueTracker θ_tr sweeps 0→2π. RIGHT axes show g(θ) = f(θ) - f(θ+π) with RED dashed y=0; YELLOW always_redraw rider traces g; live panel highlights when |g|<0.05 — the zeros guaranteed by Borsuk-Ulam.
